title: Portable Furnace
description: Portable furnaces: Cook anywhere, at anytime.
body:
# Portable Furnace

This mod adds a new item: "Portable Furnace" that you can use anywhere and at anytime without the need of placing a real furnace. If you notice any bug or features, comment!

How to use it ? Select it in your hotbar, and right click on it!

## Craft
![Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de4e0373afb9e5eb6f525e2ee2b1ecb0caedfd50.png)
## Portable Cooking
![Portable cooking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4277c9c4755fd435fe38e5ec2c55069ddee98459.png)

There is a known bug that will be addressed in a new version or in a more modern version of this mod. It can happens sometimes that the arrow and fire's filling being snappy and not updating correctly -!-.


#
Credit: Thanks to 00theblackwolf00 with his mod "Portable Crafting Table" that gave me inspiration: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/portable-crafting-table](https://modrinth.com/mod/portable-crafting-table) ! Don't hesitate to check his mod.

#
Adding this mod in a modpack and publishing it to curseforge is highly appreciated, thanks!
